eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Lane, OR; at 6:12 PM on MAY 10, 2019 Effective until 7:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lane County Emergency Management advises residents in the Row River Road area between Dowens and Shoreview to be ready to evacuate due to fire danger. Now is the time to move people with special needs, large animals, vehicles and equipment to areas closer to Cottage Grove. This is a level one, be ready, notification.
